currentState: Brief professional respect founded on shared alarm about Arthas. They do not know each other intimately, but chapter 11 lets them recognize the same danger in the same man.
powerDynamic: Neither commands the other. Uther brings mentor authority and grim insight; Sylvanas brings the warning that has just set the army moving.

physicalDynamics.pattern: Their real interaction happens outside the pavilion while the mobilized column forms behind them, turning private exchange into immediate aftermath.

nameUsage.utherCallsSylvanas: Addresses her as Ranger-General in plain military respect.
nameUsage.sylvanasCallsUther: Receives him as veteran commander rather than ceremonial paladin.

history.event: Uther gives Sylvanas the clearest available diagnosis of Arthas in chapter 11, and she believes him without needing proof beyond the launch she has just watched.

trajectory: New command-level respect born under shared dread.
